displaySummary.zh: 以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进
displaySummary.en: Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning

displayDescription.zh: MuZero 学会在没有显式环境规则的情况下进行规划。它只学习搜索所需的紧凑内部模型：策略、价值和奖励。在棋类游戏与 Atari 中，它把 AlphaZero 式规划和从经验中学习模型连接起来。
displayDescription.en: MuZero learned to plan without being given the exact rules of the environment. It built a compact internal model only for the quantities needed by search: policy, value, and reward. In board games and Atari, it linked AlphaZero-style planning with model learning from experience.

description.en: Nature article describing planning with a learned model.
description.zh: 描述用学习模型进行规划的 Nature 论文。

license.en: Reference link only; local exhibition graphics are original redraws.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地展陈图形为原创重绘。

usage.en: Source card for the gaming AI branch
usage.zh: AI 棋牌分支的资料卡片

description.en: Fast rollout slot for learned-model planning across Go, chess, shogi and Atari states.
description.zh: 面向围棋、国际象棋、将棋与 Atari 状态的学习模型规划快速演化槽位。

license.en: Locally generated exhibition clip from curated game-state data; no external broadcast footage is reused.
license.zh: 由策展棋局状态数据本地生成的展览短片；不复用外部转播画面。

usage.zh: 可播放的棋局状态演化模块

html.zh: AlphaZero 依赖已知规则搜索，而许多强化学习智能体从像素学习但缺少显式前瞻。MuZero 通过学习一个对规划有用的模型，把这两个世界连接起来，即使没有提供精确规则也能工作。
html.en: AlphaZero searched using known rules, while many reinforcement-learning agents learned from pixels without explicit lookahead. MuZero connected these two worlds by learning a model that was useful for planning even when the exact rules were not supplied.

html.zh: MuZero 不预测每个未来观测，而是学习面向奖励、价值、策略和搜索的潜在动力学模型。这个模型按是否帮助决策来评价，而不是按是否重建完整世界来评价。
html.en: Instead of predicting every future observation, MuZero learns a latent dynamics model for rewards, values, policies, and search. The model is judged by whether it helps decisions, not by whether it reconstructs the full world.

html.zh: 专家通常把 MuZero 视为学习模型规划的标志性成果。它的长期影响在于说明：基于模型的强化学习可以结合 AlphaZero 式搜索和经验驱动模型学习的优势。
html.en: Experts generally treat MuZero as a landmark in learned-model planning. Its legacy is showing that model-based reinforcement learning can combine the strengths of AlphaZero-style search with experience-driven model learning.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.

category.zh: AI 在棋牌与博弈论的演进

workTitle.en: Mastering Atari, Go, chess and shogi by planning with a learned model
workTitle.zh: 通过学习模型进行规划以掌握 Atari、围棋、国际象棋和将棋

quoteAttribution.en: Mastering Atari, Go, chess and shogi by planning with a learned model, Julian Schrittwieser et al., Nature, 2020
quoteAttribution.zh: 《通过学习模型进行规划以掌握 Atari、围棋、国际象棋和将棋》, Julian Schrittwieser 等，Nature，2020

method.en: Latent dynamics, policy-value prediction, and tree search
method.zh: 潜在动力学、策略-价值预测与树搜索

artifact.en: Planning agent for board games and Atari
artifact.zh: 面向棋类游戏与 Atari 的规划智能体

material.en: Nature paper, arXiv preprint, and DeepMind blog
material.zh: Nature 论文、arXiv 预印本与 DeepMind 博客

demo.en: See how a compact latent model replaces handcrafted game dynamics inside search.
demo.zh: 观察紧凑潜在模型如何在搜索中替代手工游戏动力学。

text.en: The model predicts internal states rather than full observations.
text.zh: 模型预测内部状态，而不是完整观测。

text.en: Search uses learned reward estimates at imagined steps.
text.zh: 搜索在想象步骤中使用学习到的奖励估计。

text.en: Planning still uses policy and value guidance.
text.zh: 规划仍然使用策略和价值引导。

text.en: The model predicts only what search needs: reward, value, and policy.
text.zh: 模型只预测搜索需要的内容：奖励、价值和策略。

text.en: Toggle between known rules and learned dynamics to see how MuZero keeps planning without a handcrafted simulator.
text.zh: 切换已知规则和学习动力学，观察 MuZero 如何在没有手工模拟器时继续规划。

description.en: Nature article describing planning with a learned model.
description.zh: 描述用学习模型进行规划的 Nature 论文。

usage.zh: 可播放的棋局状态演化模块

what.en: MuZero extended AlphaZero-style planning by learning its own compact model instead of receiving exact environment dynamics.
what.zh: MuZero 通过学习自己的紧凑模型扩展了 AlphaZero 式规划，而不是直接获得精确环境动力学。

how.en: It learned latent dynamics, reward, policy, and value predictions, then used those predictions inside tree search.
how.zh: 它学习潜在动力学、奖励、策略和价值预测，并把这些预测放入树搜索。

why.en: It worked because search did not need a perfect simulator of every future observation; it only needed a model useful for rewards and values.
why.zh: 它成功在于搜索不需要完美模拟每个未来观测，只需要一个对奖励和价值有用的模型。

title.en: Mastering Atari, Go, chess and shogi by planning with a learned model
